content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market constructive — Nifty +0.24%, Bank Nifty +0.78%, Pharma +1.62%, PSU Banks +1.04% leading; VIX cooling -2.4%. Global cues firm (S&P +0.81%, Nasdaq +1.03%). Book is well-positioned with multiple winners; focus is risk management on existing positions, not aggressive new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +6.4% with current SL 1035 already above entry 984 (locks +5.2%). CMP 1046.60, SL 1035 = 1.1% trail gap (within 1% floor discipline). No-op MODIFY would be wasteful — keeping current SL/target as-is. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge -1.1%, well above SL 119. Gold cooled from peak but medium-term thesis intact. Hold to monitor."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "At +1.8% near 52w high 1748. SL 1715 already at breakeven+. Promoter 2% stake sale overhang plus stock rejected from 1751. No-op vs current — switching to HOLD to avoid wasted MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.9% with SL 206 (CMP 207.68, gap ~0.8% — already at risk of intraday stopout but tightening would force exit). Banking sector bid, Q4 turnaround thesis intact. Let SL work."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.8% with SL at entry 4575. CMP 4656.50, raising SL to 4600 = 1.2% trail gap (above 1% floor) and locks small gain above breakeven. Defence momentum intact, new CMD catalyst, Q4 results pending mid-May. Tightening SL ahead of binary event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.8% with SL 1420 (CMP 1436.80, ~1.2% gap). Q4 PAT +124% YoY, FY26 sales +30%, net-debt-negative — fundamental thesis intact. Realty sector weak today but stock-specific story strong. Let SL work; do not loosen."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.0% with SL 6950 above entry 6900 (CMP 7052, gap 1.45% — within trail discipline). Q4 PAT +124%, EBITDA margin +875 bps, promoter pledge fully released. Strong setup; let it run toward 7400 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock surged to 862 high then faded to 834 (+0.6% from entry now). SL 820 with CMP 834 = 1.7% gap. Tightening to 825 = 1.1% gap to lock against further fade after 9% move. Jefferies Buy + 10x volume bullish but intraday distribution off highs warrants tighter risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position breakeven (-0.1%) at 52w high 369.30. Q4 PAT +31%, AUM +16%, NBFC disbursements +28%. SL 358 = 3.1% below CMP, appropriate for fresh breakout. Let setup develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.7% near 52w high. Q4 results: revenue +22%, India volumes +9%, but EBITDA margin contracted on copra costs — stock initially fell then recovered today +5.1%. SL 805 = 2.4% below CMP, appropriate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3245.00,
      "new_target": 3430.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +42% YoY, FY26 record. Position -0.8% (CMP 3278). SL 3245 = 1.0% gap, at minimum trail floor. Keeping SL/target as-is — no-op MODIFY → switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.0% post Q4 beat (+30% revenue, +91% PAT). CMP 1267.90, SL 1215 = 4.2% below, appropriate for post-earnings volatility. Cigniti merger effective May 5. Let setup develop toward 1330 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN MIS BUY at 133.50 from earlier (387m ago, still pending). Per ORDER HYGIENE, not stacking another order. CMP not provided in this batch — letting the existing order work or expire. Will reassess if it fills."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 already locks +5.2%. CMP 1046.60 = 1.1% gap, within trail discipline floor. No tightening needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, -1.1% within tolerance. Gold thesis intact medium-term."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 above entry 1700. Stock fading from 1748 ATH amid promoter stake sale overhang. Existing trail adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 206.00,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.9%, SL 206 close to CMP 207.68 — letting SL work without forcing self-stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL from 4575 (entry) to 4600 to lock small gain. Q4 results expected mid-May = binary; tightening ahead of catalyst per binary-event discipline rule 11."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1420.00,
      "reasoning": "Position -2.8%, SL 1420 just below CMP 1436.80. Strong Q4 fundamentals; do not loosen, let SL work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "reasoning": "+2.0%, SL 6950 above entry. Strong post-earnings momentum; current trail at 1.45% gap is appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 820 to 825 (1.1% from CMP 834.10) after stock faded from 862 high. Lock against further intraday distribution while preserving room for swing thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 358.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry at 52w high. SL 358 (3.1% below) appropriate for breakout setup."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 805.00,
      "reasoning": "+0.7% near 52w high, FMCG defensive. SL 805 = 2.4% below CMP, appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3245.00,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%, SL 3245 = 1% gap. Record FY26 results, Auto sector strength. Let SL work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1215.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-Q4 beat with +10% gap. SL 1215 (4.2% below) gives room for normal post-earnings volatility."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PNB: NII -4% YoY is concerning; SBI/BoB results next week will reset PSU bank baselines — wait for sector clarity before entry. SRF: Q4 print modest (+10.6%) vs NAVINFLUOR (+124%); BOPP deferral signals weakness — pass on chase. VEDL: ex-demerger price discovery underway, too noisy to enter. CAMS/GRSE/HFCL/CHOLAHLDNG/SONACOMS/IRCON/AUROPHARMA/BIOCON/AJANTPHARM/LINDEINDIA/NEULANDLAB/LALPATHLAB: all post-gap or post-news; no chase entries when book already 65% deployed with 12 holdings.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 65% deployed with 12 CNC positions across diversified sectors (HFC, ETF, Ports, Banking, Defence, Realty, Capital Goods, Chemicals, FMCG, Financials, Auto, IT). Cluster check: 3 financial-services names (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK, ABCAPITAL) ~17% of capital — at limit, no more financials adds. No new entries today — every held position has a working setup; the highest-value action is disciplined SL management (HAL trail to lock gains pre-Q4, TITAGARH trail after intraday fade). Cumulative P&L only +0.52% — strategy needs winners to compound; trailing SLs prematurely on names like BANDHANBNK or SOBHA at -1% to -3% on noise would be the failure pattern. Hold conviction."
}
